mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_schedule(user_id, title, description, start_time, end_time, type_id, is_urgent, is_important, recurrence_rule, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{typeId}, #{urgent}, #{important}, #{recurrenceRule}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
